reference: I have had keyhole surgery on my right shoulder approximately ten years ago. I am right-handed and a plasterer. I am experiencing a lot of continuous pain in my shoulder. I am on painkillers, but they are not working. It feels like having a continuous toothache. I also have bruising under the armpit.
